name: fixture-skill
description: CI test fixture skill — not a behavioral skill. Exists to prove the schema, generator, validator, and CI workflows work end-to-end. Safe to delete once real behavioral skill instances land.

triggerContext.precondition: This skill never fires in production. It exists only to exercise the generator and CI pipeline on a valid minimal instance.
exampleCues: Not consumed by Claude in runtime context

behavior.summary: No behavioral effect. This instance proves the skill pipeline plumbing is operational by being a minimal valid example that exercises every required schema field.

directives.action: Do nothing if encountered at runtime
directives.rationale: Fixture-only. Real skills live elsewhere in skills/_instances/.

transitions.trigger: Authored as CI bootstrap fixture in D-SKILLS-META-LAYER-INITIATION-1
